case.title: TOWER V. WATER HAMMER ARRESTER CORP.

opinion.h1: TOWER V. WATER HAMMER ARRESTER CORP., 330 U.S. 853 (1947)
opinion.h2: Edwin B. H. TOWER, Jr., petitioner, v. WATER HAMMER ARRESTER CORP. No. 717.
opinion.p: Mr. Harold Olsen, of Chicago, Ill., for petitioner.
Messrs. Bertram Wm. Coltman, Ralph E. Brown and Sidney Neuman, of Chicago, Ill., for respondent.
The petition for rehearing is denied.[ Tower v. Water Hammer Arrester Corp. 330 U.S. 853 (1947) ]
